corpus_note: Three verse regions: (1) protocanonical Psalms-offset case (Ps.9 Clementine maps to Ps.9+Ps.10 in OSIS via TVTMS); (2) deuterocanonical (Tob.1.1, Tobit is in the Clementine canon but not the Protestant canon, canon='deutero'); (3) standard protocanonical (Gen.1.1, no numbering offset, canon='protocanonical'). Offset is 0 because the vulgate source file is absent from this machine; the SHA-256 field is a sentinel of 64 zeros. The seed derivation test asserts length only (not offset) when the source file is absent.

verses.text_latin: In finem, pro occultis filii. Psalmus David.
verses._fixture_note: Psalms-offset case: Clementine Ps 9 covers modern OSIS Ps.9 plus Ps.10 range. TVTMS projects this reference to OSIS Ps.9.1. Stable id: vulgate-clementine:Ps.9.1

verses.text_latin: Tobias ex tribu et civitate Nephthali, quae est in superioribus Galilaeae supra Naassen, post viam quae ducit ad occidentem, in sinistro habens civitatem Sephet,
verses._fixture_note: Deuterocanonical verse. Tobit is absent from the Protestant canon. canon='deutero' enables Pipeline 2 to filter it when canon scope is Protestant-only.

verses.text_latin: In principio creavit Deus caelum et terram.
verses._fixture_note: Standard protocanonical verse with one transcription footnote marker stripped from text_latin into transcription_notes. The surface text_latin is clean for hashing.
